license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8p2hvqe
title: Miracle Prep for Plasmid Isolation
author: Blake Flood

steps_raw.instruction: Allow to grow overnight at 37 °C .
Spin culture 00:10:00 4000 x g 4 °C
Remove supt. Resuspend cells in 2 mL Buffer P1. Buffer P1 Qiagen Catalog #19051 .
2 mL Buffer P2 (invert 3-4 times) Buffer P2 Qiagen Catalog #19052
Incubate 00:03:00 @ Room temperature
2 mL Buffer N3 (invert 3-4 times) Buffer N3 Qiagen Catalog #19064
Distribute lysate into 4 x 1.5mL tubes
Centrifuge 00:10:00 @ 13200 x g
Collect supt, add 1 volume 96% EtOH, mix
Load on 4 x “QIAprep 2.0 spin columns” or any generic silica membrane mini spin column (Econospin).
Re-load and re-spin until everything is loaded.
500 µL Buffer PB to each column Buffer PB Qiagen Catalog #19066
750 uL Buffer PE
Spin again to dry 00:01:00 @ 17900 x g
Elute with 30-50 uL H2O
(Optional) Re-load H2O on columns and re-spin 00:01:00 @ 17900 x g to increase yield.
Pick colony from plate. Inoculate 50 mL LB broth per vector.
